output.summary: Updated hero-report.md with changelog entry, development notes on scoped selectors, and validation summary
output.changelog_entry: 2026-02-20 14:10 PST: Scoped Hero.js ResizeObserver selector from global .top-gradient to .hero .top-gradient to prevent conflicts with other blocks (PostHero, EventHero) that also use .top-gradient. Functional QA PASS, 10/10 checks, 1 minor pre-existing @var docblock note.

validation_summary.minor_issues_note: Pre-existing: missing @var docblock annotations for Hero.php camelCase variables
